nasb.text: And He began speaking a parable to the invited guests when He noticed how they had been picking out the places of honor at the table, saying to them,

esv.text: Now he told a parable to those who were invited, when he noticed how they chose the places of honor, saying to them,

cnv.text: 耶穌看見被邀請的客人選擇高位，就用比喻對他們說：

ccb.text: 耶稣在宴席中看见宾客们都争着坐首位，就用比喻对他们说：

csbs.text: 耶稣留意到被邀请的人怎样在那里挑选上座，就对他们讲了一个比喻说：
